ValidationRule.description: Checks if the Package Sub-Type is valid after Record Type Change
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $User.PS480FunctionValidationRulesActive__c =true , OR( AND( RecordType.DeveloperName ="Time", NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"WorkTime")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"Manufaktur")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"TravelTime")) ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName ="SupplierCosts", NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"3rdPartyCosts")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"ResourceCosts")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"AbacusInbox")) ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName ="LicenseDirect", NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"Trade")), NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"LicenseDirect")) ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName ="LicenseProvision", NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"LicenseProvision")) ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName ="Expense", NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"Expense")) ), AND( RecordType.DeveloperName ="Group", NOT(ISPICKVAL(PackageSubType__c,"None")) ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please choose the Package Sub-Type correctly. (PA018)
